# Chess Opening Principles — References

Small vocabulary for this path. Expand only when a lesson needs it.

## Principles

- **Center** — the d4, d5, e4, e5 squares (and influence over them)
- **Development** — bringing minor pieces (knights and bishops) into useful
  squares early
- **King safety** — usually castling and not leaving the king in a drafty center

## Fixture note

This fixture uses Markdown boards and flashcards. A maintained chess board
component can replace the text boards later without changing the learning loop.
